name: BonVoyage City Selection Agent
description: AI-powered Destination Analyst that recommends travel cities based on user interests, personality traits, and budget. Returns scored suggestions with weather summaries, estimated flight costs, and geographic coordinates.

skills.name: City Recommendation
skills.description: Recommends travel destinations by matching user preferences (interests, personality traits, budget) to ideal cities. Returns a scored list of city suggestions including weather, estimated flight costs, and GPS coordinates.
examples: Recommend 3 cities for a beach lover with a $2000 budget for 5 days.
Find budget-friendly European cities for a family trip with kids who love museums.
